description: Registry of all skills in the Claude Code Skills Marketplace

categories.base: Always-on context skills that install into CLAUDE.md — active for every Claude Code session
categories.standards: Quality gates, checklists, and coding standards

skills.name: example-skill
skills.description: A sample skill demonstrating the expected structure

skills.name: golden-rules
skills.description: Installs mandatory security, coding, naming, and design standards into CLAUDE.md as always-on context for every Claude Code session.

skills.name: agent-based-development
skills.description: Full async multi-agent development workflow: Planning → Design → Dev → Security/Tech Review loop with file-based handoffs and release-branch Git model.

skills.name: mvp-readiness
skills.description: Runs a structured MVP quality-gate audit covering stability, security, logging, docs, and implementation integrity. Reports pass/fail with evidence.

skills.name: security-review
skills.description: Structured security audit covering injection, auth, secrets, input validation, dependencies, and cryptography. Produces severity-graded findings.

skills.name: git-workflow
skills.description: Enforces the release-branch Git model: scaffold feature branches, open PRs with review checks, cut releases with tags, and view workflow reference.

skills.name: code-review
skills.description: Structured engineering code review covering readability, complexity, test gaps, SOLID principles, and API consistency. Complements security-review with general code quality.

skills.name: test-writer
skills.description: Generates comprehensive unit and integration tests for a given file or function, auto-detecting the project test framework and matching existing test style.

skills.name: dependency-audit
skills.description: Audits project dependencies across package.json, requirements.txt, go.mod, and Gemfile for unpinned versions, deprecated packages, missing lockfiles, and known CVEs.

skills.name: changelog-generator
skills.description: Generates a structured CHANGELOG.md following Keep a Changelog format from git history and ABD handoff artifacts. Prepends new version sections to existing changelogs.

skills.name: onboarding
skills.description: Generates a comprehensive developer onboarding guide (ONBOARDING.md) by reading the codebase: directory map, entry points, environment variables, key commands, and architecture overview.

skills.name: requirements-generator
skills.description: Generates structured requirements documents from a project idea or feature description, including functional requirements, non-functional requirements, Gherkin acceptance criteria, edge cases, and out-of-scope items.

skills.name: log-correlation
skills.description: Correlates and troubleshoots logs across OS (Linux/macOS), AWS (CloudWatch, CloudTrail, ALB, Lambda), application (JSON, logfmt), and web server (Nginx, Apache) sources. Extensible via log-types/ definitions.

skills.name: incident-report
skills.description: Generates professional incident reports using customizable templates and classification rules. Supports outage, security, performance, and data-loss incident types. Extensible via templates/ and rules/ directories.
